durable_targets: tasklog row or entry explicitly named by the user or repo policy
changelog entry explicitly named by the user or repo policy
skill review doc and ledger row when maintaining exactly one skill
write_rules: Read the existing target before writing.
Update only the active row, entry, or section supported by evidence.
Use proposed updates when the target path or write authority is unclear.
Do not rewrite unrelated chronology or unrelated skill rows.
pause_conditions: merge evidence is absent for a merge claim
the requested update requires touching another active skill
